preparation: Traditional preparations include roots in decoctions or topical folkloric preparations, but modern safety literature does not support unsupervised internal use.
region: Mediterranean basin and parts of Western/Central Asia in traditional records.
traditionalUse: Traditional records describe sedative, ritual, and analgesic uses; these historical uses should not be interpreted as evidence of modern clinical efficacy.
